description: Generate a single humorous meme image with a JSON metadata file.
prompt: I am a social media content creator, and I need a funny meme to share with my followers. Please generate a single humorous meme image saved as meme.png. The meme should be universally relatable and funny — for example, about procrastination, Monday mornings, or the gap between expectations and reality. Use a classic meme template format with an image and witty text overlay. Also generate meme.json containing the fields: topic (the meme theme), caption (the text used on the meme), and humor_style (e.g., "ironic", "self-deprecating", "observational").

evaluators.description: Check that meme.json is valid JSON
Check that meme.json has topic, caption, and humor_style
